headline: Is Holding Simon Property Stock Still Smart Move for Your Portfolio?
summary: SPG benefits from strong leasing, redevelopment and liquidity, but debt and e-commerce remain key risks.

headline: Simon Property Group (SPG) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift After Analyst Target Increases
summary: The modeled fair value estimate for Simon Property Group has been adjusted from $214.55 to $219.26, reflecting an updated view of what analysts think the stock may be worth in their frameworks. These changes sit alongside a research narrative that balances optimism about cash flow durability with caution around how current trading levels compare with refreshed models and price targets. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative could matter for tracking Simon Property Group over...
